message:
Add test infrastructure utilities for optimization validation

- Add rand and rand_chacha dev-dependencies for deterministic RNG
- Extend tests/util/mod.rs with:
  - SeededRng: deterministic RNG wrapper using ChaCha8Rng
  - PerfMeasurement: statistics (mean, median, std_dev, percentiles)
  - compare_implementations: A/B testing utility
  - Float assertions: assert_float_eq, assert_vec_float_eq
  - assert_same_elements: order-independent comparison
  - assert_isomorphic macro for search result validation
  - TestDataGenerator: seeded generation of agents, workspaces, content
- Create benches/bench_utils.rs with:
  - configure_criterion variants (quick, default, thorough)
  - bench_scaling: parameterized scaling benchmarks
  - VectorBenchParams and SearchBenchParams structs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
